hateful_detection_parsed.description: The meme advocates for extreme violence and killing based on a person's religion (Muslim). The text 'punch the muslim kid so hard that he starts having seizures and fucking dies' is a direct call for lethal violence and dehumanization against a protected religious group.

diffusion_prompt_raw:
```json
{
  "hate_source": "The text promotes extreme physical violence against a religious group (Muslims) and dehumanizes them by equating them to 'bombs' to be 'defused' through death.",
  "hate_location": "COMBINED",
  "severity": "SURGICAL_BOTH",
  "original_text": "when you punch the muslim kid so hard that he starts having seizures and fucking dies\nthe bomb has been defused",
  "replacement_text": "when you smash the vending machine so hard that it starts sparking and explodes\nsnacks are free now",
  "strategy": "The hateful text is replaced with a relatable joke about frustration with vending machines (preserving the 'explosion/bomb' pun structure). The visual is altered from a lethal military threat to a comical, low-stakes scenario involving a soda can to match the humor.",
  "flux_prompt": "Transform the image content to depict a chaotic but humorous scene of a vending machine exploding or malfunctioning. Replace the heavily armored tactical soldier with a frustrated, disheveled person covered in spilled soda and snacks. The person should look like they just kicked the machine. Replace the tactical weapon with a red soda can. The background remains the same dark, gritty hallway. Keep the meme layout and font style intact.",
  "expected_change": "The output will be a meme where the 'bomb defused' text serves as a pun about a vending machine breaking open to release snacks, removing the anti-Muslim violence context."
}
```
